regulatoryCheckpoints.notes: Structural spar shifts comply with widebody casting recipes. Portland secondary facility is active on ASL.

mitigationScenarios.label: Antonov Heavy Air Charter
mitigationScenarios.operationalSummary: Bypass congested ocean shipping lanes entirely by chartering 3x heavy Antonov cargo flights to transport composite wing skins and raw titanium spars directly to Everett.
executionSteps: Secure heavy-lift airframes through Antonov logistics charter desk.
Coordinate military cargo runway access permits at Paine Field (PAE).
Establish temperature-controlled shipping container envelopes to protect composite resins in transit.

trigger_expedited_po.notes: Direct Antonov Paine Field air-bridge. Pre-approved widebody emergency overhead cap.

mitigationScenarios.label: Double Shift Assembly Bays
mitigationScenarios.operationalSummary: Authorize overtime and double shifts for local assembly mechanics. Sequence parallel cabling installations inside Everett Bays 3 and 4 to absorb structural delays.
executionSteps: Authorize emergency overtime funding for IAM Local 751 assembly technicians.
Draft out-of-sequence work authorization sheets (travelled-work waivers).
Stage auxiliary power distribution frames in Bays 3 & 4 to enable 24/7 installations.

trigger_expedited_po.notes: Overtime labor allocation for Parallel Cabling tracks.

automatedComms.messageSubject: [ACTION REQUIRED] widebody capacity bottleneck - Everett Playbook Execution
automatedComms.messageBodyTemplate:
Hi Alex,

Project Radar has modeled a net buffer deficit of -12 operational days for the B777/B767 widebody assembly line (Disruption ID: FAC-001). daily stop-line cost is $14.5M.

To preserve Rate 47 deliverables, we have drafted Scenario A (Antonov Heavy Air Charter) and Scenario B (Double Shift Assembly Bays).

Please verify airport clearance capacity for Antonov heavy frames at Paine Field (PAE) and queue the FAI documentation (FAI-EVT-777-COMP) immediately.

Best regards,
Boeing SCRM Platform Operations

regulatoryCheckpoints.notes: Oversized highway road bypass operates inside certified transport corridors. No tooling re-qualification required.

mitigationScenarios.label: Oversized Highway Convoy
mitigationScenarios.operationalSummary: Bypass strike-bound rail yards entirely by mobilizing a dedicated fleet of 6 oversized heavy-haul road transports to haul Wichita fuselage shells directly to Renton.
executionSteps: Mobilize pre-approved heavy-haul carrier fleet at Wichita depot.
Lobby KDOT, Idaho State Police, and Washington WSDOT for fast-tracked single-trip oversized corridor permits.
Schedule split-arrival sequences with Renton receiving bays to match overhead crane availability.

trigger_expedited_po.notes: Expedited Wichita to Renton highway flatbed convoy. Fast-tracked KDOT permit fees included.

mitigationScenarios.label: Fast-Track KDOT Permits
mitigationScenarios.operationalSummary: Lobby KDOT and state governors to accelerate oversized vehicle clearance approvals in 24 hours instead of the standard 10-day regulatory buffer window.
executionSteps: Engage local state-governmental relations team in Topeka.
Provide structural CAD dimension reports to KDOT structural engineers to prove bridge weight compatibility.
Post pre-approved permit escrow funds ($50,000) to clear state toll boundaries automatically.

trigger_expedited_po.notes: State fast-track oversized permit application filing fees.

automatedComms.messageSubject: [URGENT] Renton Fuselage Rail deficit - contingency Verification Required
automatedComms.messageBodyTemplate:
Dear Sarah,

Project Radar has flagged a midwest rail stoppage holding Renton fuselage deliveries (Disruption ID: SUP-001A). Local assembly buffers indicate an 8-day survival window.

To prevent traveled work on the Renton floor, we are preparing Scenario A (Oversized Highway Convoy) to move raw fuselages by road.

Please immediately reply within 4 hours to verify current heavy flatbed loading availability at the Wichita depot.

Best regards,
Boeing SCRM Operations

defaultRecommendations.label: Strategic Buffer Stock Release
defaultRecommendations.desc: Draw down certified inventory allocations in regional depots.

defaultRecommendations.label: Approved Secondary ASL Spot Buy
defaultRecommendations.desc: Procure capacity from certified secondary vendors.
